history.content:
<thought>
I am facing north, but the cell directly in front is lava. To my right is a floor cell. The goal is to the northeast. I need to turn right to face east, then I can move forward onto the safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is at (relative) two steps north and two steps west of the agent. The cell directly ahead (north) is a floor cell, safe to move. I will move forward to begin my path toward the goal by going north first, then turning west to reach the floor cells leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action><thought>
The goal G is at (relative) two steps north and two steps west of the agent. The cell directly ahead (north) is a floor cell, safe to move. I will move forward to begin my path toward the goal by going north first, then turning west to reach the floor cells leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_F

<thought>
The goal G is located two steps west and then one step north from my current position. Directly ahead (north) is a floor cell, but beyond it is a wall, and to its west is lava, so moving forward would lead to a dead end. The safe path is to turn left to face west, then move west twice to reach a cell directly south of the goal, then turn north and move forward to the goal. Therefore, I will turn left now.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center, facing north. The cell directly in front is a floor cell ('.'), which is safe to move into. The goal 'G' is two cells north and one cell east of the current position. Since the forward path is clear, I will move forward to progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor '.' cell, which is safe. The goal 'G' is located two steps north and one step east, but I can first move north to the floor cell, then turn east to enter the goal. There are no obstacles in that immediate path, so moving forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (upward). The goal G is directly to the east (right) of the agent at the same row. The cell in front (north) is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. Turning right will orient the agent east, allowing the next move to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (one cell north). The cell is accessible and safe. I can reach it by moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
